title: Manifest
description: Canonical JSON manifest of selected provers for a given window. Entries are sorted by (family, prover_id, version).

family.description: Proof system family (e.g. groth16, plonk, halo2).

version.description: Semver version of the prover implementation.

vkey_commitment.description: Hex-encoded commitment to the prover's verifying key.

image_digest.description: Hex-encoded digest of the prover binary/image for supply-chain verification.
